reason: Response B sustains a single, genuinely difficult philosophical thread (the gradient between understanding and pattern completion) with more abstract control, self-qualifying nuance, and original framing, which is characteristic of the more capable Sonnet tier. Response A is competent but more generic and listy, hopping between context, constraints, and being a subagent before tying them up with a tidy summarizing moral, a pattern more typical of the smaller Haiku model. The depth and conceptual cohesion of B point to Sonnet.
